## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (gofmt + vet + tests)
- [ ] New behavior has tests; CLI-surface or exit-code changes have a CHANGELOG entry
- [ ] No secret values in the diff, test fixtures, or PR description
- [ ] Conventional-commit PR title
- [ ] I've read CONTRIBUTING.md and agree to the CLA
